meta.description: Seeds a preview page with the block(s) under change. Customise the post_content below per PR or per branch.
meta._comment: Copy to .github/playground-blueprint.json. The playground-preview.yml workflow references it by path.

steps.code: <?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; wp_insert_post( [ 'ID' => 2, 'post_title' => 'Block Preview', 'post_status' => 'publish', 'post_type' => 'page', 'post_content' => '<!-- Replace this comment with the block markup you want to preview. For example: <!-- wp:wpb/primary-hero {"heading":"Preview"} /--> -->' ] );
